calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon, Bailiff: Louise Perotti.
William Weiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: Courtney S. Trevino, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Armando C. Blanco.
Matter is under submission, Mr. Weiss to prepare a Proposed Judgment and leave the damages sections blank, the Court will further reviewed the evidence and grants Judgment with in a week after receiving the Blank Proposed Judgment.

July 16, 2004
Proposed Judgment received in Court.
The Court grants Judgment in favor of the Plaintiff: Courtney S. Trevino and against Defendant: Armando C. Blanco as follows:
Damages $98,000.00, costs $388.00 for the total of $98,388.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Continued To Sep-13-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
William Weiss, Esq. for Plaintiff: Courtney S. Trevino, not present in court.
The Court grants Counsel's request for a continuance to July 15, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for the Plaintiff to be present in court.
